name: Didier Malherbe
description:
'''Didier Malherbe'''{{efn|Also known as "Bloomdido" or "Bloomdido bad de Grass".}} is a French musician and poet. He has played in several bands, including [[Gong (band)|Gong]] and Hadouk.

Malherbe plays the [[saxophone]], [[flute]], [[alto clarinet]], [[ocarina]], Laotian [[Khene|Khaen]], [[Bawu]] flute, [[Hulusi]], and other [[wind instruments]]. Since 1995, the [[duduk]] has been his preferred instrument.{{AI-retrieved source|date=March 2026|checked=no}}
